name: galaid
description: Local-first launch doctor for visual novel and galgame folders.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/build-error-recipes.js && node --check scripts/build-pages.js && node --check scripts/validate-github-templates.js && node scripts/build-error-recipes.js --check && npm run check:pages && npm run check:templates && node --check src/error-recipes.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check desktop/main.js && node --check desktop/preload.js && node --check desktop/scanner.js
